stories.title: Bearman on Race Ban Watch — 10 Penalty Points, Two Away From Miami Suspension

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Ollie Bearman has 10 penalty points on his FIA Superlicense.

The race ban threshold is 12.

He's 2 points away from missing Miami — the biggest commercial event of the 2026 F1 season.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #HaasF1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Bearman survived a 50G crash at Suzuka. Then the FIA gave him penalty points.

10 penalty points. Race ban at 12. Miami is next.

Two incidents. One automatic suspension. The stakes couldn't be higher for Haas.

#F1Fanrecap #OllieBearman #F1

article.headline: Bearman on Race Ban Watch: 10 Penalty Points, Two Away From Missing Miami

stories.title: Alpine Issues Open Letter After Colapinto Crash Backlash — "Hateful Messages"

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Alpine issued a formal open letter to fans after the Suzuka crash.

Their message: the "hateful messages" directed at Colapinto were wrong.

Their point: the crash wasn't driver error. It was a regulation failure.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #AlpineF1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
A car slowing to harvest energy. Another car charging at full deployment.

50 kph speed differential. No warning lights.

This is what caused the Suzuka crash. Alpine is right to defend Colapinto.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #ColapinoF1

article.headline: Alpine Issues Open Letter Defending Colapinto: 'Hateful Messages Must Stop'

stories.title: FIA April 9 Meeting — Six Days Away, Hamilton and Sainz Lead Pushback

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The FIA meeting that could change F1 is 6 days away.

Hamilton: "Drivers have no power with the FIA."
Sainz: pushing for changes before Miami.

April 9. All 10 team directors. One unanimous vote needed.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #FIA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The April 9 FIA meeting agenda:
• Super-clipping zones
• Closing speed warnings
• Battery alert systems
• 2027 power ratio changes

Every driver wants change. But you need UNANIMOUS team agreement.

Good luck.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #FormulaOne

article.headline: FIA April 9 Meeting: Six Days to Change Formula 1's Broken Regulations

stories.title: Red Bull's Three-Stage Break Fix Plan — Jeddah, Miami, Imola

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Red Bull's 5-week plan to save Verstappen's season:

Stage 1 — Miami: floor/fence updates (less understeer)
Stage 2 — Miami: revised PU deployment maps
Stage 3 — Imola: full aero overhaul

No factory shutdown. Full development sprint.

#F1Fanrecap #RedBullF1 #Verstappen

article.headline: Red Bull's Three-Stage Fix Plan: No Factory Shutdown as Team Races to Save Verstappen's Season

stories.title: Verstappen's Race Start Crisis — MGU-H Loss Is the Root Cause

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Why is Verstappen struggling? It's technical.

The 2026 regs removed the MGU-H. Drivers must rev higher on formation laps to spool the turbo.

Verstappen has gotten it wrong 3 times in 3 races.

The four-time champion is learning a new skill.

#F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #F1

article.headline: Verstappen's Race Start Crisis Explained: The MGU-H Problem Costing Him Points

stories.title: Ferrari ADUO Power Unit — FIA-Approved, Targeted for Miami Debut

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Ferrari's new ADUO power unit has FIA approval for Miami.

They're 0.5 seconds per lap behind Mercedes. The update is designed to close that gap.

Vasseur: "Miami is a new championship."

Ferrari is coming.

#F1Fanrecap #FerrariF1 #F1
